title: Protocol for 6mA labeling and HMW DNA extraction from fresh frozen human brain samples
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"33ag3","text":"This protocol details the procedure of 6mA labeling and HMW DNA extraction of fresh frozen brain tissue. The protocol is inspired by Fiber-seq.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"9avmb","text":" ","type":"atomic","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[{"key":0,"offset":0,"length":1}],"data":{}},{"key":"2lsdq","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{"0":{"type":"citation","mutability":"IMMUTABLE","data":{"guid":"496266C0341F11EE9D4302C0B41BC903","title":"Single-molecule regulatory architectures captured by chromatin fiber sequencing.","protocol_guid":"","journal":"Science (New York, N.Y.)","date":"2020-06-26T00:00:00Z","created_on":"2026-02-10T22:33:37Z","doi":"https://doi.org/10.1126/science.aaz1646","authors":"Stergachis AB, Debo BM, Haugen E, Churchman LS, Stamatoyannopoulos JA","can_edit":false}}}}

steps: Place the Dounce homogenizer and pestles On ice , chill the centrifuge to 4 °C and preheat the ThermoMixer to 37 °C .
Carefully transfer 3-4 ( 2 mm diameter) tissue punch biopsies (~ 25 mg ) to the chilled Dounce homogenizer. Keep the Dounce homogenizer on ice during the entire disruption process.
Add 500 µL of the 1X Lysis buffer and let the tissue thaw for 00:01:00 .
Gently homogenize the tissue 10X with pestle A and 10X with B.
Push the tissue with the pestle firmly into the bottom of the Dounce chamber with each stroke (Down + Up = 1X).
Keep the tissue between tip of pestle and the bottom of the Dounce chamber for thorough homogenization.
Homogenate may become foamy, but this is not a cause for concern. In the next step, transfer any foam that forms.
Incubate On ice for 00:05:00 before adding 1000 µL of 1X Wash buffer.
Transfer the lysate to a 2 mL Protein LoBind microcentrifuge tube.
Rinse the pestles and homogenizer with the remaining 500 µL 1X Wash buffer and add to the sample.
Pellet homogenate by centrifuging at 700 x g, , and 4 °C for 00:05:00 . Discard supernatant.
Resuspend the pellet in 200 µL of 1X Hia5 labeling buffer – use a 1 mL or wide bore tip.
Incubate on a ThermoMixer at 37 °C and 900 rpm, , for 00:30:00 .
Continue with Circulomics CBB Tissue protocol from step 8 onwards. Continue with NEB Monarch HMW.
According to ONT protocol Genomic DNA by Ligation (SQK-LSK110) with the following modifications:
Start with 3 µg - 4 µg of HMW DNA in 150 uL and sheer 25x with a 26G needle or in Megaruptor to 35kb.
Adjust volumes end-prep and FFPE repair step accordingly (i.e. vol x 3), omit control strand (CS).
Extend ligation step to 01:00:00 at Room temperature .
Extend end-prep and FFPE repair steps from 00:05:00 to 00:30:00 (i.e. 30min at 20 °C and 30 min at 65 °C ).
Elute the AMPure cleanups for 00:10:00 and 00:20:00 after the end-prep and ligation steps.

This should yield a ~3x library, aim to load near the high end of the 5-50fmol range, typically ~ 8 µL . Note 1:Library prep yield is typically 30-50%. Note 2:The amount loaded can be reduced during subsequent flushes to balance seq yield with # flushes.
creator: Koen Theunis
